who: logistics coordinators for freight brokers processing 10-20 deliveries/week
offer: For logistics coordinators for freight brokers processing 10-20 deliveries/week, inefficient routing causes delayed deliveries. We provide optimized routing software instead of manual route planning and Excel spreadsheets.
problem: Inefficient routing of delivery vehicles leading to increased fuel costs and delayed deliveries.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics coordinators seeking solutions
Indie Hackers posts discussing logistics challenges
DM outreach to logistics coordinators with demo video
Engage in community forums for logistics tools and tips
try_it: Let users try route optimization algorithm and trip report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
